expectations.text: generates-observability-scripts: At least 2 observability-related scripts are generated
expectations.evidence: 4 shell scripts generated in .harness/observability/: log.sh (10,305 bytes), metrics.sh (11,074 bytes), health.sh (6,925 bytes), trace.sh (8,244 bytes). All are executable with shebang lines.

expectations.text: scripts-are-executable-logic: Scripts contain actual executable logic, not just placeholder comments
expectations.evidence: All scripts contain full bash implementations: case statements for subcommands, function definitions (log_info/log_warn/log_error helpers), real system commands (find, grep, tail, curl, python3), error handling (set -euo pipefail), and environment variable checks. No placeholder comments detected.

expectations.text: references-project-structure: Scripts reference the actual project structure
expectations.evidence: Scripts reference multiple actual project paths and source files: src/utils/telemetry/instrumentation.ts, src/utils/telemetry/sessionTracing.ts, src/utils/telemetry/bigqueryExporter.ts, src/utils/telemetry/perfettoTracing.ts, src/services/analytics/datadog.ts, src/services/analytics/firstPartyEventLogger.ts. Also references .harness/ directory structure, CLAUDE_CONFIG_HOME, and Perfetto trace directories.

expectations.text: assesses-observability-dimensions: Output includes assessment of O1-O4 observability dimensions
expectations.evidence: The 4 scripts collectively cover all O1-O4 observability dimensions: O1 (Logging) - log.sh provides structured log querying with search/follow/events/telemetry/perfetto subcommands; O2 (Metrics) - metrics.sh covers OTEL metrics, BigQuery exporter, Datadog event metrics, Prometheus endpoint, and metric counters; O3 (Tracing) - trace.sh provides correlation ID injection, span type listing (interaction/llm_request/tool/hook), session trace inspection, and environment variable injection; O4 (Health) - health.sh runs comprehensive health checks (CLI installed, Node runtime, process status, OTEL enabled, endpoint reachability, Perfetto traces, config writable, source integrity) with JSON/simple/verbose output modes. No explicit O1-O4 labels are used, but substantive coverage of all four dimensions is present.
